content.description: Replaced hardcoded path /workspace/nexus-mk2-artifacts/transcripts/pending in on_stop.sh and on_pre_compact.sh with NEXUS_TEMP_DIR-derived path. Hooks now use NEXUS_TEMP_DIR/transcripts/staged per the NexusEnvironment contract. Updated scribe-all.sh PENDING_DIR to match the new staging location so the scribe workflow stays consistent.
